description: DEPRECATED: Use tags_get_summary instead for listing tags. This tool is only needed when you require the full list of tag names in a single result. For 'list my tags' or 'show tags' requests, ALWAYS use tags_get_summary which is more efficient. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use `dsl_execute_plan` with a multi-step plan instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve tags for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested.

tagNames.description: Array of tag names (strings only, not full tag objects). This prevents hallucination by keeping response minimal.

total.description: Total number of tags available for this client (or partner client).
